name: brandkit
tagline: Prompt-craft skill for generating premium brand-kit identity board images: logo concepting, panel layouts, palettes, and mockups.
verdict: No security concerns — pure creative-direction content with rich, concrete examples (symbols, taglines, palettes) and decidable defaults for layout and visual mode. Held back by hygiene: no version/changelog, no scope exclusions despite broad reach, and a 798-line single file that inlines catalogs (visual modes, palettes, layouts) better split into.

highlights.summary: Description thoroughly explains what it generates but never frames when/what user phrasing should trigger it.
No 'NOT for' / scope-exclusion guidance despite broad image-generation scope that overlaps general logo/mockup skills.
798-line SKILL.md inlines full visual-mode catalog, palette lists, and tagline/symbol examples instead of splitting bulk catalogs into references/*.md.
